provly.description: ProvLy is a digital home inventory vault that helps users document belongings, store receipts and photos, and generate organized reports for insurance claims and record keeping.

features.0: Care Autopilot: Deterministic AI that auto-schedules maintenance tasks based on your specific appliances and equipment
features.1: Claim Center: One-tap generation of comprehensive Claim Packs (PDF, CSV, and ZIP) containing all receipts, serial numbers, and photos
features.2: Warranty Tracker: A dedicated ledger that alerts you before your product protections expire

nexusbuild.description: NexusBuild is an intelligent PC building assistant that helps users choose compatible components, optimize performance, and plan custom computer builds with clarity and confidence.

features.0: AI Architecture Recommendations: Leverages local and cloud-based AI to suggest optimized builds based on specific budgets and performance goals
features.1: Compatibility Engine: Real-time checking of socket types, power requirements, and physical dimensions like GPU clearance

noobs.description: NooBS Investing Guide is a beginner-friendly investing companion that teaches core financial concepts through structured lessons, simulations, and step-by-step learning paths.

features.0: Paper Trading Simulator: A real-time market simulation where users can practice trading with virtual currency
features.1: NooBS Game Modules: Custom-built interactive mini-games that visualize complex concepts like compound interest, diversification, and volatility
features.2: Visual Portfolio Analytics: Premium data visualizations that make tracking performance intuitive and visually rewarding

neuromoves.description: Neuromove is a guided learning companion for young children, with structured routines, parent tools, and progress tracking.

features.0: Guided Activities: Step children through structured tasks with supportive prompts
features.1: Parent Tools: Manage child profiles, routines, and progress notes in one place
features.2: Progress Tracking: Keep learning goals, journals, and milestones organized

progress.0: Core learning activity flows and onboarding

about.label: Who We Are
about.title: Northern Step Studio
about.subtitle: Northern Step Studio is a hands-on product studio building practical software across home readiness, learning, and hardware planning.

story.title: What This Studio Actually Is
story.p1: Northern Step Studio is a hands-on product studio, not a generic agency. We build software around specific real-world jobs: protecting a home inventory, planning a PC build, making investing easier to learn, supporting guided routines for children, and helping people improve credit with clearer next steps.
story.p2: Every app we build, every game we design, and every tool we create is crafted with discipline and precision. We don't chase trends—we focus on solving real problems and delivering real value.
story.p3: Our name reflects our approach: steady, deliberate progress. Each step forward is intentional, building toward something greater. We're not just making apps—we're building a studio ecosystem that will continue to grow and evolve.

mission.label: Our Mission
mission.title: Building Smart Tools for Real People
mission.desc: We exist to create digital products that empower users. From productivity tools that save time to games that bring joy, every product in our portfolio is designed with the user at the center. Simple. Beautiful. Effective.

quality.title: Quality First
quality.desc: We never ship something we wouldn't use ourselves. Every detail matters.

simplicity.title: Simplicity
simplicity.desc: Complex problems deserve elegant solutions. We make powerful tools feel effortless.

innovation.title: Innovation
innovation.desc: We embrace new technologies and approaches to stay ahead of the curve.

craft.title: Craftsmanship
craft.desc: We take pride in our work. Every line of code, every pixel, every interaction.

faqs.q1: Are all products public right now?
faqs.a1: No. Some products are public, some are still in development, and some are still represented on the site before wide release. The product page is the source of truth for readiness.
faqs.q2: How do I know which products are stable enough to try?
faqs.a2: Read the status badge, milestone checklist, platform, and CTA on the product page first. We use those signals to show whether something is live, coming soon, or still moving through internal work.
faqs.q3: Are these all the same kind of app?
faqs.a3: No. The studio spans home inventory, PC planning, investing education, guided support for children, and credit improvement. The site is meant to make those lanes obvious instead of hiding them behind vague studio language.
faqs.q4: Does the studio use AI in every product?
faqs.a4: No. Some products are deterministic first and only use AI where it improves speed or clarity. Others stay local-first or workflow-driven by design.
faqs.q5: What is the best way to ask for access or support?
faqs.a5: Use the Contact page and be specific about the product, page, or workflow you are asking about. That gives us the fastest path to respond accurately.

support.title: Need a direct answer?
support.desc: If the docs do not cover your product, workflow, or access request, contact the studio directly.
